revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-445

A form of radio receiver generally used in the remote (radiated) field of the transmitter, which is used to give a warning in the event of a significant change in radiated power.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Radiation monitor}}
